requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — IEC/CISPR 15 Basis via SLS, and TRCSL Radio Approval
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 发射——经 SLS 采用的 IEC/CISPR 15 基础，及 TRCSL 无线电核准
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 發射——經 SLS 採用的 IEC/CISPR 15 基礎，及 TRCSL 無線電核准

summary.en: Sri Lanka does not operate an EU-style horizontal EMC Directive. Electromagnetic disturbance for lighting is addressed through SLS standards that adopt the IEC / CISPR base series (CISPR 15 for radio-disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting equipment), applied where SLSI certification for a lamp or luminaire references the relevant SLS / IEC standard. For luminaires with radio functionality (e.g., Wi-Fi / Bluetooth smart lighting), the dominant regulatory control is the Telecommunications Regulatory Commission of Sri Lanka (TRCSL), which requires type approval / dealer registration for radio-emitting equipment placed on the Sri Lankan market. Manufacturers should confirm with SLSI whether the specific lamp category requires demonstrated EMC emissions conformity, and with TRCSL whether the wireless module needs type approval.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡不实施欧盟式横向 EMC 指令。照明产品的电磁骚扰通过采用 IEC / CISPR 基础系列的 SLS 标准处理（CISPR 15 为电气照明设备无线电骚扰特性），在 SLSI 对某灯或灯具的认证引用相关 SLS / IEC 标准时适用。对于具无线电功能的灯具（如 Wi-Fi / 蓝牙智能照明），主导监管为斯里兰卡电信监管委员会（TRCSL），对投放斯里兰卡市场的射频设备要求型号核准/经销商注册。制造商应向 SLSI 确认具体灯型是否须证明 EMC 发射合规，并向 TRCSL 确认无线模块是否须型号核准。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡不實施歐盟式橫向 EMC 指令。照明產品的電磁騷擾通過採用 IEC / CISPR 基礎系列的 SLS 標準處理（CISPR 15 為電氣照明設備無線電騷擾特性），在 SLSI 對某燈或燈具的認證引用相關 SLS / IEC 標準時適用。對於具無線電功能的燈具（如 Wi-Fi / 藍牙智能照明），主導監管為斯里蘭卡電信監管委員會（TRCSL），對投放斯里蘭卡市場的射頻設備要求型號核准/經銷商注冊。製造商應向 SLSI 確認具體燈型是否須證明 EMC 發射合規，並向 TRCSL 確認無線模塊是否須型號核准。

standards_or_laws: SLS standards adopting CISPR 15 (limits and methods of measurement of radio-disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting equipment) as referenced in SLSI certification
Telecommunications Regulatory Commission of Sri Lanka (TRCSL) — type approval / registration for radio-emitting equipment

summary.en: China's equivalent emissions standard is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification for relevant luminaire categories sold in China, with testing at CNAS / CMA-accredited laboratories. For wireless-enabled luminaires sold in China, SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval is additionally required.
summary.zh: 中国对应发射标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。相关类别在华销售灯具的 CCC 认证要求符合 GB 17743，检测须在 CNAS / CMA 认可实验室进行。在华销售的无线灯具还须取得 SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准。
summary.zht: 中國對應發射標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。相關類別在華銷售燈具的 CCC 認證要求符合 GB 17743，檢測須在 CNAS / CMA 認可實驗室進行。在華銷售的無線燈具還須取得 SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: Both the Sri Lankan SLS / IEC route and China's GB 17743 derive from CISPR 15, so emission limits are largely harmonised in technical content. The main differences are procedural: (1) China bundles EMC emissions into mandatory CCC, whereas Sri Lanka addresses emissions via the SLS / IEC standard referenced in SLSI certification — confirm with SLSI whether the specific category requires an emissions test report; (2) China CCC EMC test reports are not automatically accepted for the Sri Lankan SLSI scheme — a test report against the adopted SLS / IEC (CISPR 15) standard, ideally from an ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory, should be provided; (3) for radio-emitting smart luminaires, China requires SRRC type approval while Sri Lanka requires separate TRCSL approval — the two are not mutually recognised and the wireless module must be approved by TRCSL for the Sri Lankan market.
gap.zh: 斯里兰卡 SLS / IEC 路径与中国 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，发射限值技术内容基本协调。主要差异在程序上：（1）中国将 EMC 发射纳入强制 CCC，而斯里兰卡通过 SLSI 认证引用的 SLS / IEC 标准处理发射——请向 SLSI 确认具体类别是否须发射检测报告；（2）中国 CCC EMC 检测报告不自动被斯里兰卡 SLSI 方案接受——应提供按所采用 SLS / IEC（CISPR 15）标准、理想情况下由 ILAC MRA 认可实验室出具的检测报告；（3）对于射频智能灯具，中国要求 SRRC 型号核准，斯里兰卡要求单独的 TRCSL 核准——两者不互认，无线模块须经 TRCSL 核准方可进入斯里兰卡市场。
gap.zht: 斯里蘭卡 SLS / IEC 路徑與中國 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，發射限值技術內容基本協調。主要差異在程序上：（1）中國將 EMC 發射納入強制 CCC，而斯里蘭卡通過 SLSI 認證引用的 SLS / IEC 標準處理發射——請向 SLSI 確認具體類別是否須發射檢測報告；（2）中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告不自動被斯里蘭卡 SLSI 方案接受——應提供按所採用 SLS / IEC（CISPR 15）標準、理想情況下由 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室出具的檢測報告；（3）對於射頻智能燈具，中國要求 SRRC 型號核准，斯里蘭卡要求單獨的 TRCSL 核准——兩者不互認，無線模塊須經 TRCSL 核准方可進入斯里蘭卡市場。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — no horizontal EMC Directive; emissions addressed via the SLS / IEC (CISPR 15) standard referenced in SLSI certification for the relevant category. TRCSL type approval is required for radio-emitting (smart/wireless) luminaires
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 emissions compliance required as part of CCC for relevant luminaire categories; SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless luminaires

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Sri Lanka has no EU-style horizontal EMC Directive. Lighting EMC emissions are addressed through the SLS / IEC (CISPR 15) standard referenced in SLSI certification, and radio-emitting smart luminaires require TRCSL type approval. Emission limits are broadly harmonised with China's GB 17743 (both CISPR 15-derived), but China CCC EMC reports and SRRC approvals are not automatically accepted in Sri Lanka. Confirm the required emissions evidence with SLSI and the wireless approval pathway with TRCSL for the specific product.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 斯里兰卡没有欧盟式横向 EMC 指令。照明 EMC 发射通过 SLSI 认证引用的 SLS / IEC（CISPR 15）标准处理，射频智能灯具须取得 TRCSL 型号核准。发射限值与中国 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本协调，但中国 CCC EMC 报告及 SRRC 核准不自动被斯里兰卡接受。请就具体产品向 SLSI 确认所需发射证据、向 TRCSL 确认无线核准路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 斯里蘭卡沒有歐盟式橫向 EMC 指令。照明 EMC 發射通過 SLSI 認證引用的 SLS / IEC（CISPR 15）標準處理，射頻智能燈具須取得 TRCSL 型號核准。發射限值與中國 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本協調，但中國 CCC EMC 報告及 SRRC 核准不自動被斯里蘭卡接受。請就具體產品向 SLSI 確認所需發射證據、向 TRCSL 確認無線核准路徑。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Immunity — IEC 61547 Basis vs GB/T 18595
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 抗扰度——IEC 61547 基础 vs GB/T 18595
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 抗擾度——IEC 61547 基礎 vs GB/T 18595

summary.en: Sri Lanka has no horizontal legal EMC immunity obligation comparable to the EU EMC Directive. Immunity for lighting equipment (per the IEC 61547 base series — equipment for general lighting purposes, EMC immunity requirements) is relevant only where the SLS / IEC product standard cited in SLSI certification includes immunity provisions for that category. In practice, immunity testing is treated as a product-quality and standard-conformity matter rather than a standalone market-access barrier. Manufacturers should confirm with SLSI whether the SLS / IEC standard applicable to the specific lamp or luminaire requires demonstrated immunity, and include any required IEC 61547-based immunity test evidence in the conformity documentation.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡没有相当于欧盟 EMC 指令的横向法定抗扰度义务。照明设备抗扰度（依据 IEC 61547 基础系列——一般照明设备的 EMC 抗扰度要求）仅在 SLSI 认证所引用的 SLS / IEC 产品标准对该类别含抗扰度条款时才相关。实践中，抗扰度检测被视为产品质量与标准符合性事项，而非独立的市场准入门槛。制造商应向 SLSI 确认适用于具体灯或灯具的 SLS / IEC 标准是否要求证明抗扰度，并在合规文件中纳入任何基于 IEC 61547 的抗扰度检测证据。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡沒有相當於歐盟 EMC 指令的橫向法定抗擾度義務。照明設備抗擾度（依據 IEC 61547 基礎系列——一般照明設備的 EMC 抗擾度要求）僅在 SLSI 認證所引用的 SLS / IEC 產品標準對該類別含抗擾度條款時才相關。實踐中，抗擾度檢測被視為產品質量與標準符合性事項，而非獨立的市場准入門檻。製造商應向 SLSI 確認適用於具體燈或燈具的 SLS / IEC 標準是否要求證明抗擾度，並在合規文件中納入任何基於 IEC 61547 的抗擾度檢測證據。

standards_or_laws: SLS standards adopting IEC 61547 (equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements) where referenced in SLSI certification

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 18595-2014 (General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment), technically equivalent to IEC 61547. GB/T 18595 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian) and is less strictly enforced than China's mandatory emissions standard GB 17743; CCC certification for Chinese luminaires focuses more on safety and emissions than on immunity.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 18595-2014（照明设备的电磁抗扰度要求），技术上等同于 IEC 61547。GB/T 18595 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），执行力度弱于中国强制发射标准 GB 17743；中国灯具的 CCC 认证更侧重安全和发射而非抗扰度。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 18595-2014（照明設備的電磁抗擾度要求），技術上等同於 IEC 61547。GB/T 18595 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），執行力度弱於中國強制發射標準 GB 17743；中國燈具的 CCC 認證更側重安全和發射而非抗擾度。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18595-2014 — General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, aligned with IEC 61547)

gap.en: Both Sri Lanka (via adopted SLS / IEC standards) and China (GB/T 18595) trace to IEC 61547, so immunity test methods and levels are largely harmonised. Neither jurisdiction treats immunity as a hard horizontal market-access barrier in the way the EU EMC Directive does: in China GB/T 18595 is a recommended standard, and in Sri Lanka immunity is relevant only where the cited SLS / IEC product standard includes it. The practical gap is documentation: a Chinese product already tested to GB/T 18595 generally meets the IEC 61547 technical base, but the SLSI conformity file should reference the immunity evidence against the SLS / IEC standard version applicable in Sri Lanka. Confirm with SLSI whether immunity evidence is required for the specific lamp category.
gap.zh: 斯里兰卡（经采用的 SLS / IEC 标准）与中国（GB/T 18595）均源自 IEC 61547，抗扰度试验方法及等级基本协调。两地均不像欧盟 EMC 指令那样将抗扰度作为硬性横向市场准入门槛：中国 GB/T 18595 为推荐性标准，斯里兰卡仅在所引用 SLS / IEC 产品标准含抗扰度时才相关。实际差距在于文件：已按 GB/T 18595 测试的中国产品通常满足 IEC 61547 技术基础，但 SLSI 合规文件应引用针对斯里兰卡适用 SLS / IEC 标准版本的抗扰度证据。请向 SLSI 确认具体灯型是否须提供抗扰度证据。
gap.zht: 斯里蘭卡（經採用的 SLS / IEC 標準）與中國（GB/T 18595）均源自 IEC 61547，抗擾度試驗方法及等級基本協調。兩地均不像歐盟 EMC 指令那樣將抗擾度作為硬性橫向市場准入門檻：中國 GB/T 18595 為推薦性標準，斯里蘭卡僅在所引用 SLS / IEC 產品標準含抗擾度時才相關。實際差距在於文件：已按 GB/T 18595 測試的中國產品通常滿足 IEC 61547 技術基礎，但 SLSI 合規文件應引用針對斯里蘭卡適用 SLS / IEC 標準版本的抗擾度證據。請向 SLSI 確認具體燈型是否須提供抗擾度證據。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — no horizontal EMC immunity obligation; immunity (IEC 61547 base) applies only where the SLS / IEC product standard cited in SLSI certification includes it. Confirm with SLSI for the specific category
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 18595-2014 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; immunity testing is not universally enforced for all luminaire categories under CCC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Sri Lanka has no horizontal EMC immunity barrier comparable to the EU EMC Directive. Immunity (IEC 61547 base) is relevant only where the SLS / IEC product standard referenced in SLSI certification includes it, and China's GB/T 18595 is a recommended standard. Because both jurisdictions share the IEC 61547 base, a product already tested to GB/T 18595 typically has a reduced re-testing burden, but the SLSI conformity file should include immunity evidence where the applicable SLS / IEC standard requires it. Confirm scope with SLSI.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 斯里兰卡没有相当于欧盟 EMC 指令的横向抗扰度门槛。抗扰度（IEC 61547 基础）仅在 SLSI 认证引用的 SLS / IEC 产品标准含此项时才相关，中国 GB/T 18595 为推荐性标准。由于两地共用 IEC 61547 基础，已按 GB/T 18595 测试的产品通常可减少重新测试负担，但在适用 SLS / IEC 标准要求时，SLSI 合规文件应纳入抗扰度证据。请向 SLSI 确认范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 斯里蘭卡沒有相當於歐盟 EMC 指令的橫向抗擾度門檻。抗擾度（IEC 61547 基礎）僅在 SLSI 認證引用的 SLS / IEC 產品標準含此項時才相關，中國 GB/T 18595 為推薦性標準。由於兩地共用 IEC 61547 基礎，已按 GB/T 18595 測試的產品通常可減少重新測試負擔，但在適用 SLS / IEC 標準要求時，SLSI 合規文件應納入抗擾度證據。請向 SLSI 確認範圍。
